Name: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' that occur without being followed by any other activity (i.e., terminal occurrences)
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases

Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Frequency of variants containing 'Completed + In Call' compared to variants ending in 'Completed + Closed'
Metric: Number of 'Completed + In Call' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Closed' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Completed + In Call' appears more than once

Metric: Number of 'Completed + In Call' activities == 'High' where ma is the last value of impact

Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all cases

Metric: Number of 'Completed + In Call' activities for cases where activity 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs

Name: Percentage of total case duration attributable to traces ending in 'Completed + In Call' versus those continuing to 'Completed + Resolved'

Metric: Number of 'Completed + In Call' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + Closed' occurs
